dtsPropsFor.Receipt: /** The computed metric value this receipt explains (values are verbatim API strings — never parsed to float). */ value: { metric: string; value: string; unit: string; period_start: string; period_end: string; calc_name: string; calc_version: string; certification_status: 'uncertified' | 'certified'; metric_value_id?: string; scope?: string; detail?: Record<string, unknown> };
dtsPropsFor.SeverityIcon: /** One of 'blocking' | 'warning' | 'info' (any string renders the neutral form). */ severity: string;
dtsPropsFor.Modal: /** id of the element (inside the modal) that names the dialog. */ titleId: string; onClose: () => void; children: React.ReactNode;
dtsPropsFor.LineageGraph: /** Root of the lineage tree (kind 'computed.metric_values' at the top, 'raw.records' leaves). */ root: { kind: string; id: string; transform_name?: string | null; transform_version?: string | null; inputs?: { kind: string; id: string; transform_name?: string | null; transform_version?: string | null; inputs?: unknown[] }[] };
dtsPropsFor.ChartCard: heading: string; description: string; /** Accessible table twin of the chart. */ table: { caption: string; columns: string[]; rows: React.ReactNode[][] }; /** Shown under the description in chart view (e.g. the keyboard hint). */ hint?: string; children: React.ReactNode;
dtsPropsFor.TimeSeriesChart: series: { id: string; label: string; /** A validated --series-* token, e.g. 'var(--series-1)'. */ color: string; points: { x: number; xLabel: string; /** displayed figure: the API string verbatim */ display: string; y: number }[] }[]; /** Accessible name for the reader layer. */ ariaLabel: string; unit: string; yMax?: number; referenceLine?: { y: number; label: string };
dtsPropsFor.SeverityStackedBar: bars: { key: string; label: string; segments: { severity: string; label: string; count: number; /** formatted tally for display */ displayCount: string; /** status token, e.g. 'var(--chart-status-warning)' */ color: string }[]; displayTotal: string }[]; legend: { severity: string; label: string; color: string }[];
